code:
%%{FinTech_AuthVault}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-09.01 — Knowledge Ingestion Pipeline (FinTech_PaymentGateway)

[FinTech_LedgerService] --> DISCOVER : SourceDiscovered
note right of DISCOVER
  Discover new sources:
  • hub/project outputs, repos, web docs, datasets
  • governance & treasury artifacts
  • manual submissions or connectors
end note

DISCOVER --> INGEST : SourceSelected
note right of INGEST
  Fetch & stage raw content (FinTech_FraudDetection)
  • capture provenance (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
  • store raw blob refs for audit
end note

INGEST --> PARSE : SourceFetched
note right of PARSE
  Content extraction & normalization
  • text, tables, code blocks, media metadata
  • language detect, mime routing
end note

PARSE --> DEDUP : Parsed
note right of DEDUP
  De-duplication & canonicalization
  • simhash/LSH near-duplicate checks
  • keep canonical doc id
end note

DEDUP --> ENTITY_LINK : Deduped
note right of ENTITY_LINK
  NER + entity resolution:
  • link to DID, project, hub, proposal, stream
  • add typed edges with confidences
end note

ENTITY_LINK --> EMBED : EntitiesLinked
note right of EMBED
  Embedding & feature generation:
  • domain-specific models
  • chunking + vector store write
end note

EMBED --> INTEGRATE : EmbeddingGenerated
note right of INTEGRATE
  Integrate into graph:
  • apply ontology constraints
  • validate schemas & ids
end note

INTEGRATE --> SYNTH : Integrated
note right of SYNTH
  Synthesis:
  • summaries, explanations, citations
  • produce derived notes & insights
end note

SYNTH --> PUBLISH : KnowledgeUpdated
note right of PUBLISH
  Publish to consumers:
  • Metrics (FinTech_AuthVault), UI (FinTech_FraudDetection), API (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
  • expose search/RAG endpoints
end note

PUBLISH --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue] : Published

%% ---- Quality review & human-in-the-loop ----
EMBED --> REVIEW : LowConfidence / DriftDetected
ENTITY_LINK --> REVIEW : AmbiguousLink
REVIEW --> EMBED : ReEmbed
REVIEW --> ENTITY_LINK : FixLinking
REVIEW --> REJECTED : NotRelevant
REJECTED --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]

%% ---- Failure & recovery paths ----
INGEST --> FAILED : FetchError / AuthError
PARSE --> FAILED : ExtractError / UnsupportedFormat
INTEGRATE --> FAILED : SchemaMismatch / ConstraintViolation
FAILED --> [FinTech_FraudDetection] : IngestionFailed

%% ---- Maintenance / indexing ----
PUBLISH --> UPDATE_INDEX : BuildIndexes
UPDATE_INDEX --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue] : IndexReady

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DISCOVER,INGEST,PARSE,DEDUP,ENTITY_LINK,EMBED,INTEGRATE,SYNTH,PUBLISH,REVIEW,REJECTED,FAILED,UPDATE_INDEX core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_PaymentGateway设计一个知识摄取管道，核心是从多个源头发现数据，最终输出到TransactionQueue。我设想从LedgerService作为起点，经过Discover、Ingest、Parse这些阶段。
明白，LedgerService触发Discover阶段。Ingest阶段需要关联FraudDetection做内容获取吗？还有，Parse之后的数据流向哪里？
是的，Ingest阶段要捕获来源信息并存储原始blob，FraudDetection参与内容获取。Parse之后进入DEDUP做去重，然后到ENTITY_LINK做实体解析。
已添加DEDUP和ENTITY_LINK。ENTITY_LINK需要解析DID、project、hub这些实体并添加带置信度的边，对吗？
没错。接下来到EMBED阶段生成向量嵌入，使用领域特定模型，然后写入向量存储。之后是INTEGRATE阶段应用本体约束。
EMBED和INTEGRATE已添加。INTEGRATE之后是SYNTH做摘要生成，最后PUBLISH输出到AuthVault、FraudDetection和PaymentGateway的API？
对，但还需要处理质量问题。EMBED阶段如果检测到LowConfidence或Drift，要进入REVIEW人工审核；ENTITY_LINK遇到AmbiguousLink也要进REVIEW。
REVIEW节点已添加，支持ReEmbed和FixLinking两条修复路径。那审核不通过的数据呢？
REJECTED的数据直接返回到PaymentGateway做失败处理。另外，INGEST、PARSE、INTEGRATE都要有失败路径到FAILED节点。
检查了一下，INGEST的失败条件应该是FetchError或AuthError，PARSE是ExtractError或UnsupportedFormat，INTEGRATE是SchemaMismatch或ConstraintViolation。FAILED最终输出到FraudDetection。
正确。最后加一个维护路径：PUBLISH之后触发UPDATE_INDEX构建索引，完成后到TransactionQueue。
全部完成。主流程用橙色高亮显示，包含DISCOVER到PUBLISH的9个核心节点，加上REVIEW、REJECTED、FAILED、UPDATE_INDEX四个辅助节点。
